text:
Viet Minh agents infiltrated by Ho Chi Minh several years ago. These men have assumed Laotian names, speak the language, and are highly successful among the politically naive Laotians.

Comment: Cousseau's estimate on the number of Viet Minh adherents in Laos is much higher than others.

The American chargé in Vientiane reports that the Laotian cabinet, since the Geneva conference, has been unable to unite on a strong point of view. He believes there is a danger of relaxation with a consequent loss of control to the subversives
